Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 37 

COMMENT: If the beneficiary was not enrolled in a managed care plan for a given month, this variable will be 
null/missing for that month. 

You need to know both the Part C contract number and plan benefit package (PBP; monthly variables 
called PTC_PBP_ID_XX) in order to identify the specific plan in which a beneficiary was enrolled. The
